summary: Testing completed for Goodtime Diagnostic B2B app updates - investmentLesson replaces valorisation. Backend API tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend UI flow: Welcome → User Info → Qualification → 22 Questions → Validation → Results all working. The new investmentLesson block with 'investment as ACTIF, not dépense' message is correctly displayed for all 3 segments (artisanal, transition, machine).

issues: GPT analysis sometimes uses 'Pierre' placeholder name instead of actual firstName - minor GPT prompt issue (same as iteration_1)

critical_code_review_comments: investmentLesson correctly replaces valorisation in backend (server.py lines 307-335, 521-548, 695-719)
investmentLesson has proper structure: titre, message, keyPoints (4 elements) for all 3 segments
Frontend ResultsScreen.jsx correctly renders investmentLesson with title and keyPoints
API response no longer contains 'valorisation' field
seed_data_creation: N/A - diagnostic entries saved to MongoDB automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Changes tested: 1) valorisation block removed from API response and UI. 2) investmentLesson block added with business message about 'investment as ACTIF not dépense'. 3) Each of 3 segments (artisanal 0-18, transition 19-32, machine 33-44) has its own investmentLesson with unique titre and message. 4) All investmentLesson keyPoints have exactly 4 elements. 5) Roadmap 12 months still present. 6) Full diagnostic flow works: welcome → user info → qualification → 22 questions → validation → results with AI analysis.
